query: 写一份易方达和华夏主动权益综合对比报告，包含规模、业绩和持仓

args.sql: WITH fund_list AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_name, fund_company FROM fund_size WHERE fund_company IN ('易方达', '华夏') LIMIT 200) SELECT s.fund_code AS 基金代码, s.fund_name AS 基金名称, s.fund_company AS 基金公司, s.fund_size AS 规模, ROUND(p.portfolio_return * 100, 2) AS 业绩百分比, h.stock_name AS 持仓股票, h.holding_quantity AS 持仓数量, h.holding_value AS 持仓市值 FROM fund_list s LEFT JOIN fund_size s2 ON s.fund_code = s2.fund_code AND s2.date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_size WHERE fund_code = s.fund_code) LEFT JOIN fund_performance p ON s.fund_code = p.fund_code AND p.period='本年以来' LEFT JOIN fund_holding h ON s.fund_code = h.fund_code AND h.date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_holding WHERE fund_code = s.fund_code) LIMIT 200

plan.rationale: 该查询从基金规模表中筛选出易方达和华夏的基金，获取最新规模，结合业绩和持仓信息，展示两者的对比
